title: forestiera veracruzana
intro: Forestiera veracruzana, also known as Lycium berlandieri var., is a plant species native to Mexico, belonging to the family Oleaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Forestiera veracruzana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat gastrointestinal problems, among other conditions. Forestiera veracruzana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat a range of ailments.
